title: Battle of Fondor (disambiguation)
content:
Multiple '''battles''' occurred on [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor]].

==Canon==
*[[Attack on Fondor]] during the [[Galactic Civil War]]
*[[Battle of Fondor Shipyards]] later in the war

==Legends==
==='''[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]'''===
*[[Skirmish at the Fondor Shipyards]]

==='''[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]'''===
*[[Invasion of Fondor]]
*[[Fondor shipyard assault]]
*[[Raid on the Fondor Shipyards]]
*[[Sorties against Fondor Shipyards]]

==='''[[Yuuzhan Vong War]]'''===
:*[[Battle of Fondor]]
:*[[Battle at Fondor]]

==='''[[Second Galactic Civil War]]'''===
:*[[Skirmish over Fondor]]
:*[[Second Battle of Fondor]]
